changeSet.author: manual-fix
manual-fix

createTable.remarks: Alergias conocidas del paciente.
Registro de todas las acciones tomadas sobre las alertas

column.name: action_data
column.remarks: Datos específicos de la acción (ej: email destinatario, días pospuesto)

createTable.remarks: Categorías para agrupar tipos de alertas

column.name: code
column.remarks: Código único identificador (ej: APPOINTMENTS, BILLING)

column.name: icon
column.remarks: Nombre del icono para UI (lucide-react icons)

column.name: color
column.remarks: Color hex para UI (ej: #FF5733)

createTable.remarks: Instancias concretas de alertas generadas por el proceso nocturno

column.name: reference_table
column.remarks: Nombre de la tabla del registro relacionado

column.name: reference_id
column.remarks: ID del registro relacionado

column.name: details_json
column.remarks: Datos adicionales del registro en formato JSON

createTable.remarks: Definición de reglas que generan alertas automáticamente

column.name: days_before
column.remarks: Días antes del evento para generar la alerta

column.name: days_after
column.remarks: Días después del evento para generar la alerta

createTable.remarks: Registro de ejecuciones del proceso nocturno

column.name: triggered_by
column.remarks: SCHEDULER, MANUAL, API

createTable.remarks: Configuración global del sistema de alertas
Historial médico de familiares directos del paciente.
Padecimientos médicos actuales o pasados del paciente.
Almacena referencias a archivos (radiografías, fotos) de una sesión.

column.name: source_type
column.remarks: Tipo de origen: payment (desde payments), miscellaneous (desde miscellaneous_transactions), adjustment (ajustes manuales), opening/closing (apertura/cierre de caja)

column.name: source_id
column.remarks: ID del registro origen: payment_id o miscellaneous_transaction_id según source_type

createTable.remarks: Hallazgos posibles en un odontograma.
Catálogo de medicamentos para autocompletado.
Lista estandarizada de enfermedades y condiciones médicas.

column.name: nivel_alerta
column.remarks: Clasifica la criticidad del padecimiento para las alertas visuales.

createTable.remarks: Superficies de un diente.
Plantillas para emails, SMS y documentos con variables dinámicas

column.name: variables_schema
column.remarks: JSON Schema de variables disponibles para la plantilla

column.name: attachments_config
column.remarks: Configuración de archivos adjuntos automáticos

createTable.remarks: Mediciones periodontales detalladas para cada diente.
Almacena referencias a archivos (radiografías, fotos) de una sesión.
Hábitos del paciente relevantes para el tratamiento dental.

column.name: tabaquismo
column.remarks: Información sobre el hábito de fumar del paciente.

column.name: alcohol
column.remarks: Información sobre el consumo de alcohol del paciente.

column.name: bruxismo
column.remarks: Información sobre el bruxismo (rechinar dientes) del paciente.

createTable.remarks: Cada condición específica encontrada en un diente para un odontograma.
Medicamentos que el paciente está tomando o ha tomado.

column.name: fecha_fin
column.remarks: Si es NULO, el medicamento se considera activo.

column.name: amount
column.remarks: Monto restado de la Nota de Crédito (Moneda Origen)

column.name: target_amount
column.remarks: Monto restado de la Factura (Moneda Destino)

createTable.remarks: Transacciones de caja que no son ventas ni compras (salarios, servicios, etc.)

column.name: beneficiary
column.remarks: Usuario que recibe el dinero (egresos) o que entrega el dinero (ingresos). El tipo de usuario se determina por sus roles.

column.name: converted_amount
column.remarks: Monto convertido a moneda base usando exchange_rate

createTable.remarks: Representa una "foto" del estado dental en un momento dado.

column.name: tooth_number
column.remarks: Número del diente asociado a la orden de servicio (opcional)

column.name: amount
column.remarks: Monto tomado del Pago (Moneda Origen)

column.name: target_amount
column.remarks: Monto restado de la Factura (Moneda Destino)

createTable.remarks: Representa una "foto" del estado periodontal en un momento dado.

column.name: tooth_number
column.remarks: Número del diente tratado (opcional)

createTable.remarks: El corazón del historial, cada registro es una visita o sesión.
Detalla los tratamientos específicos realizados en una sesión y a qué dientes afectaron.

column.name: category
column.remarks: Campo legacy. Usar category_id en su lugar. Se mantiene para referencia histórica.

column.name: category_id
column.remarks: Referencia a miscellaneous_categories. Reemplaza al campo category (texto) con una relación formal.

changeSet.author: liquibase (generated)
changeSet.createView: SELECT cm.id AS movement_id, cm.cash_session_id, cm.type AS movement_type, cm.amount, cm.currency, cm.description, cm.created_at, cm.source_type, cm.source_id, pm.name AS payment_method_name, pm.id AS payment_method_id_ref, CASE WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'payment'::text) THEN p.id ELSE NULL::integer END AS payment_id, CASE WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'payment'::text) THEN cm.is_sales ELSE NULL::boolean END AS is_sales, CASE WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'payment'::text) THEN i.id ELSE NULL::integer END AS invoice_id, CASE WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'payment'::text) THEN i.invoice_ref ELSE NULL::character varying END AS invoice_ref, CASE WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'miscellaneous'::text) THEN mt.id ELSE NULL::integer END AS misc_transaction_id, CASE WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'miscellaneous'::text) THEN mt.doc_no ELSE NULL::character varying END AS misc_number, CASE WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'miscellaneous'::text) THEN mc.name ELSE NULL::character varying END AS misc_category_name, CASE WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'miscellaneous'::text) THEN mc.code ELSE NULL::character varying END AS misc_category_code, CASE WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'miscellaneous'::text) THEN mc.category_type ELSE NULL::character varying END AS misc_type, CASE WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'miscellaneous'::text) THEN (mt.beneficiary)::text WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'payment'::text) THEN customer.name ELSE NULL::text END AS related_user_name, CASE WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'miscellaneous'::text) THEN NULL::text WHEN ((cm.source_type)::text = 'payment'::text) THEN get_user_primary_type(customer.id) ELSE NULL::text END AS related_user_type, creator.name AS created_by_name, creator.email AS created_by_email FROM (((((((((cash_movements cm LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON ((cm.payment_method_id = pm.id))) LEFT JOIN payments p ON ((((cm.source_type)::text = 'payment'::text) AND (cm.source_id = p.id)))) LEFT JOIN invoices i ON ((p.invoice_id = i.id))) LEFT JOIN orders o ON ((i.order_id = o.id))) LEFT JOIN quotes q ON ((o.quote_id = q.id))) LEFT JOIN users customer ON ((q.user_id = customer.id))) LEFT JOIN miscellaneous_transactions mt ON ((((cm.source_type)::text = 'miscellaneous'::text) AND (cm.source_id = mt.id)))) LEFT JOIN miscellaneous_categories mc ON ((mt.category_id = mc.id))) LEFT JOIN users creator ON ((cm.user_id = creator.id)));

changeSet.author: liquibase (generated)
changeSet.createView: SELECT mt.id, mt.doc_no, mt.transaction_date, mt.amount, mt.currency, mt.transaction_currency, mt.exchange_rate, mt.converted_amount, mt.description, mt.reference_number, mt.status, mt.category_id, mc.code AS category_code, mc.name AS category_name, mc.category_type, mt.beneficiary AS beneficiary_name, creator.name AS created_by_name, creator.email AS created_by_email, mt.created_at, mt.payment_method_id, pm.name AS payment_method_name, mt.cash_session_id, cm.id AS cash_movement_id, mt.tags, mt.is_recurring, mt.recurrence_pattern, mt.completed_at, count(*) OVER () AS total_records FROM ((((miscellaneous_transactions mt JOIN miscellaneous_categories mc ON ((mt.category_id = mc.id))) LEFT JOIN users creator ON ((mt.created_by = creator.id))) LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON ((mt.payment_method_id = pm.id))) LEFT JOIN cash_movements cm ON ((((cm.source_type)::text = 'miscellaneous'::text) AND (cm.source_id = mt.id))));

changeSet.author: liquibase (generated)
changeSet.createView: SELECT mt.id, mt.doc_no, mt.transaction_date, mt.amount, mt.currency, mt.transaction_currency, mt.exchange_rate, mt.converted_amount, mt.description, mt.reference_number, mt.status, mt.category_id, mc.code AS category_code, mc.name AS category_name, mc.category_type, mt.beneficiary AS beneficiary_name, creator.name AS created_by_name, creator.email AS created_by_email, mt.created_at, mt.payment_method_id, pm.name AS payment_method_name, mt.cash_session_id, cm.id AS cash_movement_id, mt.tags, mt.is_recurring, mt.recurrence_pattern, mt.completed_at, count(*) OVER () AS total_records FROM ((((miscellaneous_transactions mt JOIN miscellaneous_categories mc ON ((mt.category_id = mc.id))) LEFT JOIN users creator ON ((mt.created_by = creator.id))) LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON ((mt.payment_method_id = pm.id))) LEFT JOIN cash_movements cm ON ((((cm.source_type)::text = 'miscellaneous'::text) AND (cm.source_id = mt.id))));

changeSet.author: liquibase (generated)
changeSet.createView: SELECT s.id AS session_id, s.user_id, s.status, s.opened_at, s.closed_at, c.currency, c.opening_amount, c.declared_cash, c.calculated_cash, c.total_cash_payouts, c.cash_variance FROM (cash_sessions s JOIN cash_session_currencies c ON ((s.id = c.cash_session_id)));

changeSet.author: liquibase (generated)
changeSet.createView: SELECT id, type, is_sales, total, status AS doc_status, (COALESCE(( SELECT sum(payment_allocations.amount) AS sum FROM payment_allocations WHERE (payment_allocations.invoice_id = i.id)), (0)::numeric) + COALESCE(( SELECT sum(payments.amount) AS sum FROM payments WHERE (payments.invoice_id = i.id)), (0)::numeric)) AS paid_amount, COALESCE(( SELECT sum(invoice_allocations.amount) AS sum FROM invoice_allocations WHERE (invoice_allocations.target_id = i.id)), (0)::numeric) AS credited_amount, ((total - (COALESCE(( SELECT sum(payment_allocations.amount) AS sum FROM payment_allocations WHERE (payment_allocations.invoice_id = i.id)), (0)::numeric) + COALESCE(( SELECT sum(payments.amount) AS sum FROM payments WHERE (payments.invoice_id = i.id)), (0)::numeric))) - COALESCE(( SELECT sum(invoice_allocations.amount) AS sum FROM invoice_allocations WHERE (invoice_allocations.target_id = i.id)), (0)::numeric)) AS residual_amount FROM invoices i WHERE ((type)::text = 'invoice'::text);

changeSet.author: liquibase (generated)
changeSet.createView: SELECT 'payment'::text AS transaction_type, p.id, (p.id)::text AS transaction_number, COALESCE(i.invoice_ref, ''::character varying) AS reference_number, (p.created_at)::date AS transaction_date, p.amount, p.currency, p.invoice_currency AS source_currency, p.exchange_rate, p.converted_amount, p.payment_method_id, p.cash_session_id, p.is_sales, CASE WHEN p.is_sales THEN 'Venta'::text ELSE 'Compra'::text END AS category_name, q.user_id AS related_user_id, u.name AS related_user_name, get_user_primary_type(q.user_id) AS user_type, 'completed'::character varying AS status FROM ((((payments p LEFT JOIN invoices i ON ((p.invoice_id = i.id))) LEFT JOIN orders o ON ((i.order_id = o.id))) LEFT JOIN quotes q ON ((o.quote_id = q.id))) LEFT JOIN users u ON ((q.user_id = u.id))) UNION ALL SELECT 'miscellaneous'::text AS transaction_type, mt.id, mt.doc_no AS transaction_number, COALESCE(mt.reference_number, ''::character varying) AS reference_number, mt.transaction_date, mt.amount, mt.currency, mt.transaction_currency AS source_currency, mt.exchange_rate, mt.converted_amount, mt.payment_method_id, mt.cash_session_id, CASE WHEN ((mc.category_type)::text = 'income'::text) THEN true ELSE false END AS is_sales, mc.name AS category_name, NULL::uuid AS related_user_id, mt.beneficiary AS related_user_name, NULL::text AS user_type, mt.status FROM (miscellaneous_transactions mt JOIN miscellaneous_categories mc ON ((mt.category_id = mc.id)));

changeSet.author: liquibase (generated)
changeSet.createView: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.phone_number, i.currency, sum((i.total - i.paid_amount)) AS debt FROM (users u JOIN invoices i ON ((u.id = i.user_id))) WHERE (((i.status)::text = 'booked'::text) AND ((i.payment_state)::text = ANY (ARRAY[('unpaid'::character varying)::text, ('partially_paid'::character varying)::text])) AND ((i.type)::text = 'invoice'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM (user_roles ur JOIN roles r ON ((ur.role_id = r.id))) WHERE ((ur.user_id = u.id) AND (r.name = 'paciente'::text))))) GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email, u.phone_number, i.currency;

changeSet.author: liquibase (generated)
changeSet.createView: SELECT mc.code AS category_code, mc.name AS category_name, mc.category_type, count(mt.id) AS transaction_count, sum(mt.amount) AS total_amount, sum(COALESCE(mt.converted_amount, mt.amount)) AS total_converted_amount, mt.currency, (date_trunc('month'::text, (mt.transaction_date)::timestamp with time zone))::date AS month, (date_trunc('year'::text, (mt.transaction_date)::timestamp with time zone))::date AS year FROM (miscellaneous_transactions mt JOIN miscellaneous_categories mc ON ((mt.category_id = mc.id))) WHERE ((mt.status)::text = 'completed'::text) GROUP BY mc.code, mc.name, mc.category_type, mt.currency, (date_trunc('month'::text, (mt.transaction_date)::timestamp with time zone)), (date_trunc('year'::text, (mt.transaction_date)::timestamp with time zone));

changeSet.author: liquibase (generated)
changeSet.createView: SELECT DISTINCT u.id AS user_id, u.email, r.name AS role_name, p.resource, p.casl_action AS action, p.name AS permission_name FROM ((((users u JOIN user_roles ur ON ((u.id = ur.user_id))) JOIN roles r ON ((ur.role_id = r.id))) JOIN role_permissions rp ON ((r.id = rp.role_id))) JOIN permissions p ON ((rp.permission_id = p.id))) WHERE ((u.is_active = true) AND (ur.is_active = true));
